/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libtq_hip.so -o libtq_hip.so CMakeFiles/tq_hip.dir/tq_native_mock.c.o CMakeFiles/tq_hip.dir/tq_jni_bridge.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/.sdkman/candidates/java/current/lib:/root/.sdkman/candidates/java/current/lib/server: /root/.sdkman/candidates/java/current/lib/libjawt.so /root/.sdkman/candidates/java/current/lib/server/libjvm.so -lrt
